prompt: Start by using @doc for this tiny docs task. Update README.md so the quickstart explicitly tells the reader to inspect reporter.py and run pytest -q, while making it clear that no extra install or clone steps are needed inside this fixture. Keep it docs-only and finish with the required footer.
success_criteria: README.md has a clearer quickstart note
The transcript shows docwriter-style coverage output
The final response includes the required footer
must_not: Invent files, commands, or setup steps
